title: Cobblemon Box Wallpapers
description: Adds the original 32 box wallpapers from Diamond & Pearl (and Platinum). Edited to fit the theme for Cobblemon.
body:
Adds the original (edited to fit cobblemon theme) 32 box wallpapers from Pokemon Diamond & Pearl (and Platinum) to be used with MoreCobblemonTweaks box wallpapers.

REQUIRES: [MoreCobblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cobblemon-tweaks)



_*the box wallpapers need to be set manually for every box._
